title: Hemionitis kitchingii

The classification of Hemionitis kitchingii is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Division: Pteridophyta, Class: Polypodiopsida, Order: Polypodiales, Family: Dryopteridaceae, Genus: Hemionitis, Species: H. kitchingii.
